reviews.review_description: One of the worst experience with VR

I've been unable to access battle mode for the past few days. I keep getting a message that says I need to be connected to the internet, even though I'm already connected to the internet. Does anyone have any idea what could be causing this issue? I tried uninstalling and reinstalling both the game and the Oculus VR software, but the issue persists. The issue appears to be specific to the game, because I can access everything else on my gear VR through the internet with no issues. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

06/10/2018... Once again, I've been unable to log into the game. I'm getting the message, please update game version, and there is no new game version to update to, that I can find. This game is extremely unreliable. If could give zero stars, I would.
I had a problem trying to log in to the game
Quick and fun, betterave graphics would be nice
Definitly worth a try. Just make sure you in when event is open

I played the game for about 2 hours. Being a wizard and shooting different Spells at monsters while teleporting around a level is quite fun out of it. But every time you fire a spell, depending on the name of the attack, you'll hear: "FIREBALL!!!" or "snowball". It was funny at gorst, but after using my fireball spell 5 times, it got annoying quick.

There is also not much to do in the game. On starting. I have ti wait 25 minutes to be even allowed to play pvp. And there is only 1 level to play in so far.

Adding more levels, changing the volume of some sounds *ahem* "FIREBALL!!!" And adding more variety would make this more entertaining in my opinion.

developer_response.body:
Hi Kutari,

Thank you for your feedback.  We will try to adjust the voiceover, and continuously add features.

reviews.review_description: After about 10 seconds it always returns to Oculus home for no reason. This doesn't happen in any other app and there are others who have the same issue.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ivanf,

Sorry about what you have experienced.  Can you recall what you were doing while being sent to the Oculus store?  

Thanks,

Narvalous Support

reviews.review_title: Compete with friends in VR world
reviews.review_description: Feels very excited to compete with others in VR world! The game is easy to learn, and that is very fun when I play PVP with my friends, also PVE is challenging! Really recommend!
FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL FIREBALL

I assumed that showing a Profile would mean we could customize our avatars. Tapping on the Profile and the avatar doesn't do anything for me.

The PvE needs more variety and I think it should start off a bit easier. The number enemies quickly becomes overwhelming and very little experience is awarded. When I'm making just a few EXP each round and it takes 50 EXP to get from lvl1 to lvl2, I'm not psyched about grinding my way up especially when I have no idea what lvling up will even do for me.
Used every possible email account and unable to sign up and wont allow access to anything unless you sign up.  Such a shame.
It is telling me my email is invalid or in use. It says this about both of them. There is way to contact support. Ridiculous issues that I have only had with this game.

The content for single player is a survival mode that gets boring within three minutes.  I didn’t really mind because I just wanted the PvP, but it won’t ever allow me to enter PvP mode.  This game has terrible graphics, terrible play, terrible content, and buggy to the point of being unplayable.  Refund please.
Absolutely terrible! Spent 30 minutes trying to log in, unsuccessfully. Refund please.
